name: Senolytics scaffold bootstrap revision-state repair
summary: Marks the senolytics scaffold bootstrap candidate as needs_revision and records that its source-fidelity review limitation plus missing synthesis-boundary and taxonomy-mapping lanes remain unresolved until separate review work is completed.

scope.question: Repair the lifecycle and audit state for the senolytics scaffold bootstrap candidate after its linked source-fidelity review returned a needs_revision verdict.

proposed_records.rationale: Tracks this bounded self-healing repair candidate and its required review lanes.
Aligns the target candidate lifecycle and summary with the linked needs_revision source-fidelity review and the still-missing synthesis-boundary and taxonomy-mapping review lanes.

promotion.summary: Promoted to accepted after all required active review lanes passed.
